testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Unable to parse remote response: Unable to find resource, invalid path in url. Host info: host: 'LAPTOP-23EOHQUV', ip: '192.168.1.8'

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Unable to parse remote response: Unable to find resource, invalid path in url. Last 1 characters read: U, next 44 characters to read: nable to find resource, invalid path in url.
